description: Get ready for a serious attention grabbing session while you walk past in these Capella slip-on shoes from rockport. Designed for continuous wear and superior walking comfort, these shoes are a great blend of form and function. Team these with chinos and polo neck tees for casual Fridays or for weekend getaways.Upper Full-grain leather upper with nappa lining for added strength and durability and to retain the natural look of the hide This leather upper also makes it easy to clean and enhances shoe life Padded tongue and collar to help protect from excessive rubbing and prevent blisters Carbon rubber lining along toe box to enhance protection of forefoot and increase shoe life Stitch detailing for added style Midsole Moulded footbed made of polyurethane (PU) for long term wear Shock absorbant cushioning to reduce foot fatigue Perforated insole for breathability and added cushioning Strobel technology on the heel to provide cushioned comfort for the feet, but is at the same time firm and enhances support and flexibility to aid walking Outsole Flex grooves and circular lugs provide durable grip on various surfaces Added support on inner arch of the foot for better support Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole delivers shock absorption reducing foot fatigue Moisture absorbent, odour resistant cushioning keeps feet dry and comfortable AdiPRENE technology employed in outsole for added cushioning to protect the feet from impact Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
